tasks.verification_command: bash -c 'set -e; missing=0; for f in $(git ls-files ".harness/contracts/sprint-*.md"); do n=$(basename "$f" .md); if [ "$n" = "sprint-fx" ] || [ "$n" = "sprint-fy" ]; then continue; fi; t=".harness/contracts/$n.tasks.json"; if [ "$n" \!= "sprint-01" ] && [ "$n" \!= "sprint-02" ] && [ "$n" \!= "sprint-03" ] && [ "$n" \!= "sprint-04" ] && [ "$n" \!= "sprint-05" ]; then if [ ! -f "$t" ]; then echo "MISSING $t"; missing=1; fi; fi; done; exit $missing'
tasks.rationale: From Sprint 6 onward, every sprint contract must emit a sibling tasks.json. This invariant uses git ls-files with the full sprint-*.md glob (matches 2-digit sprint numbers like sprint-10) so the gate protects every prior sprint's artifacts and excludes the synthetic fixture sprints (sprint-fx, sprint-fy) which live under tests/fixture-project/.

tasks.verification_command: bash -c 'set -e; sprints=$(git ls-files ".harness/contracts/sprint-*.md" ".harness/evals/sprint-*.md" | grep -v "sprint-12"); if [ -z "$sprints" ]; then echo "no historical artifacts found"; exit 1; fi; diff_out=$(git diff HEAD -- $sprints); if [ -n "$diff_out" ]; then echo "HISTORICAL ARTIFACTS MODIFIED:"; echo "$diff_out" | head -50; exit 1; fi; exit 0'
tasks.rationale: Eval results and contracts for prior sprints are append-only (per spec.md). This invariant uses git ls-files | git diff HEAD to detect modifications to any committed Sprint 1-11 artifact. The current sprint (sprint-12) is excluded so in-progress work doesn't trip the gate.
